stories.headline: OECD cuts 2026 global growth forecast and warns of recession risk if Iran war persists

stories.headline: Drone race: How Ukraine's defence tech redefined Russia's war
stories.summary: In its most recent attacks against Ukraine, Russia hit the cities with dozens of ballistic missiles, knowing very well that this is one of the very few weapons Ukraine remains vulnerable to. As for the drones — this is where Kyiv mastered both defensive and offensive know-how.

stories.headline: Iranian drone attack causes heavy damage to Kuwait airport as US and Iran trade strikes

Iran's IRGC said it had targeted the US Navy's 5th Fleet headquarters in Bahrain.

stories.headline: EU Allows Room for Energy Crisis Aid, But With a Green Emphasis

stories.headline: Drone attack on UAE's Barakah more dangerous than Zaporizhzhia, IAEA chief tells Euronews
stories.summary: Rafael Grossi told Euronews the drone strike on the operating UAE nuclear plant posed greater risks than Zaporizhzhia because its reactors were live at the time of the attack, warning that tonnes of nuclear material could have triggered a radiological accident with "very, very serious consequences".

Henry Nowak was handcuffed as he lay dying in December after his killer, Vickrum Digwa, falsely accused him of racism.
